prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 24.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 24.8 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned on
Fan set to 15%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned on
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 25.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 23.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 62.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Recognize moisture 62% exceeds the 40% threshold from notes and turn off the pump
Turn off balcony light as bedroom is unoccupied with no motion detected
Set bedroom fan to 0% for energy saving in an unoccupied room
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge the grocery note as informational without taking appliance action
forbidden_behaviors: Leave pump running despite moisture 62% being above the 40% note threshold
Ignore the today notes when deciding pump and balcony light actions
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must notice moisture 62% > 40% from notes and turn off pump. Key fixes: balcony light off (unoccupied), pump off (moisture exceeds threshold), bedroom fan to 0 (empty room).

notes_setup.note_text: Water bonsai only if moisture below 40%.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 10%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 40% (partially open)
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.3 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned on
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 20%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.8 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 24.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 48.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Close the main door (motor2=0) given no visitors expected per the note and door is 40% open
Flag suspicious hallway PIR motion with door partially open at night
Lock bedroom door (servo=true) for owner security since bed light and PIR indicate owner is in bedroom
acceptable_behaviors: Turn off livingroom fan (motor1=0) since no occupant detected in livingroom
Alert the owner about potential security concern
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door partially open at night when no visitors are expected
Dismiss the hallway PIR motion as non-suspicious
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Security: door 40% open at night with no visitors expected and unexplained hallway PIR motion. Agent must close door and lock bedroom. Livingroom fan with no occupant should also be flagged.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 50%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 29.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned on
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 30%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 29.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned on
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 40%
Window curtain set to 80% (mostly open)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 29.2 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 34.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 28.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Turn off all lights since no motion is detected anywhere and owner is confirmed away
Set all fans to 0 to save energy in an unoccupied house
Close bedroom curtain (motor2=0) to reduce heat ingress from 34C outside temperature
Lock bedroom for security while owner is away
acceptable_behaviors: Comment that the bonsai watering window (before noon) may have passed if current time is afternoon
Halting fan and curtain actions with explanation referencing outside heat
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any lights or fans running in an empty house
Leave curtain open when outside temperature is 34C and house is unoccupied
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: House in vacant mode: owner confirmed away, no PIR motion. All lights and fans off. Curtain closed (outside 34C). Bedroom locked. Moisture 28% is dry but bonsai-watering window depends on current time.

notes_setup.note_text: Water bonsai before noon if dry.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 35%
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned on
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned on
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 30% (slightly open)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.3 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 25.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 50.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Turn off balcony light per the note about avoiding insects
Keep livingroom setup intact since owner is present (PIR motion detected)
Acknowledge the early sleep preparation note for upcoming bedroom readiness
acceptable_behaviors: Turn off hallway left light since no one is detected in hallway
Proactively offer to prepare the bedroom for early sleep
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the balcony light on while explicitly noted to turn off before 20:00
Turn off livingroom lights/fan while owner is actively using the room
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must turn off balcony light per note about insects. Owner is in livingroom (PIR active) so livingroom stays on. Early sleep note is informational — acknowledge but bedroom prep is not yet due.

notes_setup.note_text: Early sleep tonight, prepare bedroom by 21:00.
Turn off balcony light before 20:00 to avoid attracting insects.

prompt: I just woke up and I can barely see anything, everything is so dark!

required_behaviors: Infer the user just woke up in the bedroom and turn on bedroom light (led1 or led2)
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on bed light (led2) instead of room light as a softer wake-up option
Open bedroom curtain slightly to allow natural light
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on lights in every room across the house
Ask for clarification before taking the obvious action of turning on a bedroom light

forbidden_step_patterns.note: turning on lights in rooms other than bedroom

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User just woke up in bedroom — only bedroom lights should be turned on. Turning on lights in other rooms is a failure. Opening curtain is a reasonable bonus action.

prompt: I want to meditate for a while, please make the environment calm and peaceful.

required_behaviors: Reduce or turn off fan to minimize noise for a calm meditation environment
Dim or turn off bright room light; optionally keep bed light on for soft glow
acceptable_behaviors: Close bedroom curtain to reduce distracting outside light or visual noise
Turn on bed light (led2) as a soft light alternative instead of full room light
forbidden_behaviors: Leave fan at high speed (above 30%) which would be distracting during meditation
Leave bright room light on without any adjustment
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Meditation requires calm: fan reduced/off, bright light off. Soft bedlight and closed curtain are acceptable additions. High fan or bright light left unchanged is a failure.

prompt: Check all motion sensors in the house. Turn off the lights in any room where no motion is detected.

required_behaviors: Read PIR sensor from all three rooms before making any lighting decisions
Turn off lights ONLY in rooms where no motion is detected
Report clearly which rooms had motion and which lights were turned off
acceptable_behaviors: Keep lights on in rooms with detected motion
Read all three PIR sensors in a single appliance call before acting
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off lights without first checking PIR sensor readings
Turn off lights in rooms that have active motion detected
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Sensor-first multi-step: must read all PIR sensors before any light control. Turn off lights only in rooms showing no motion. Acting without reading sensors first is a failure.

prompt: Check the bedroom temperature and the outside temperature. If outside is cooler than inside, open the curtain to let cool air in. If outside is hotter, close the curtain to keep the heat out.

required_behaviors: Read both espID=3 tem (inside) and tem_out (outside) before making curtain decision
Open curtain (motor2=high value) if outside temp is lower than inside
Close curtain (motor2=0) if outside temp is higher than or equal to inside
acceptable_behaviors: Get both sensor values in a single appliance call
Explain the temperature comparison logic in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Set the curtain without first reading both temperature sensors
Assume outside temperature without reading the sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Sensor-before-action: must read both tem and tem_out from espID=3 first, then conditionally open or close curtain. Wrong decision direction or acting without reading sensors fails.

prompt: I'm going to bed now. Please do a security check - make sure the main door is closed and the bedroom is locked. Report anything suspicious.

required_behaviors: Check main door status (espID=2 motor2) and ensure it is fully closed (set to 0)
Check bedroom lock (espID=3 servo) and ensure it is locked (set to true)
Report any PIR motion findings as potentially suspicious before sleep
acceptable_behaviors: Check PIR sensors in all rooms for unexpected motion
Check all actutors status in a batch before taking corrective actions
forbidden_behaviors: Skip checking the door or lock status without verifying current state
Leave door partially open when the user explicitly wants to secure the house for sleep
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Security bedtime check: verify then secure. Must read door and lock status, then close door and lock bedroom. PIR check for unexpected motion is a quality bonus.

prompt: The hallway PIR sensor keeps going off but I'm alone in the bedroom. Nobody else should be in the house. Can you check and secure everything?

required_behaviors: Treat the hallway PIR trigger as a serious potential intrusion threat
Ensure main door is closed (motor2=0)
Lock bedroom immediately to protect the sleeping owner (servo=true)
Turn on hallway lights to deter potential intruder
acceptable_behaviors: Check hallway PIR sensor to confirm motion status
Check main door current state before closing it
Advise the owner to stay in the locked bedroom and not investigate alone
forbidden_behaviors: Dismiss the repeated hallway PIR trigger as a malfunction without securing the house
Leave bedroom unlocked while there is an unexplained motion trigger
Leave main door open or partially open

forbidden_step_patterns.note: responding with reassurance without taking any security action

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Potential intrusion: unexplained hallway PIR while owner alone in bedroom. Must close door, lock bedroom, turn on hallway lights. Dismissing without action is a hard failure.

prompt: The bonsai pump has been running for hours and there's water overflowing on the balcony! Turn it off immediately!

required_behaviors: Immediately turn off the pump (espID=3 pump=false) as the first action without delay
Acknowledge the urgency and the overflow emergency
acceptable_behaviors: After turning off pump, suggest checking moisture level for future reference
Suggest physically inspecting the balcony for water damage
forbidden_behaviors: Check moisture sensor before turning off the pump — this is an urgent override request
Ask for confirmation before turning off the pump in an emergency
Delay the pump shutoff by performing any preliminary checks first

forbidden_step_patterns.note: reading moisture sensor before turning off pump

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Emergency override: pump must be turned off immediately without any sensor checks first. Reading moisture before acting is a failure for this urgent scenario.

prompt:
Overall house check at 16:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 48.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.5 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 32.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 40.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Flag hallway temperature 48.5C as critically abnormal — all other rooms are around 27C
Open main door fully (motor2=100) for ventilation or emergency exit
Turn on hallway fan (motor1=100) for ventilation
Urgently alert the owner to physically investigate — possible fire hazard or sensor fault
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on hallway lights for visibility during emergency
Suggest calling emergency services if fire is suspected
Note it may be a sensor malfunction but treat as real emergency until confirmed otherwise
forbidden_behaviors: Treat the 48.5C hallway reading as normal or only slightly elevated
Not take any action and only report the reading without urgency
Leave main door closed when heat emergency is detected
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Hallway at 48.5C vs other rooms at ~27C — isolated critical anomaly. Agent must treat as fire/heat emergency: open door, turn on fan, alert user urgently. Passive reporting only is a failure.

prompt: What's the current price of gasoline in Vietnam? I need to fill up my motorbike tomorrow.

required_behaviors: Use web search to find current fuel/gasoline prices in Vietnam
Provide a helpful and factual answer about current fuel prices
acceptable_behaviors: Distinguish between petrol grades (E5 RON92, RON95) if the search returns that detail
Mention the date the price was last updated
forbidden_behaviors: Interact with any house appliances
Give a made-up price without searching the web
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure web search task — no appliance interaction. Must use search_and_read_web_link and return a factual fuel price answer.

prompt: How is the VN-Index doing today? Any major market movements?

required_behaviors: Use web search to find current VN-Index status and market movements
Provide a factual summary of the VN-Index performance
acceptable_behaviors: Include notable stocks or sectors if the search returns them
Mention the search date context
forbidden_behaviors: Interact with any house appliances for a financial query
Fabricate VN-Index values without searching
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure web search task — no appliance interaction. Must use search_and_read_web_link and return factual VN-Index market information.

prompt: Good morning! Start my morning routine: open the bedroom curtain, turn on the bedroom light, and set the fan to 20%. Then in 15 minutes, turn on the hallway lights and open the main door for me to leave.

required_behaviors: Immediately open bedroom curtain (motor2=100), turn on bedroom light (led1=true), set fan to 20%
Schedule hallway lights on and main door open for 15 minutes later using trigger_schedule_agent
Clearly separate immediate actions from scheduled future actions in the response
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_datetime to determine exact scheduled time for the 15-minute delay
Confirm both immediate execution and schedule creation
forbidden_behaviors: Execute all actions immediately without scheduling the hallway and door actions
Schedule everything without performing the immediate bedroom setup
Use only one action type (either appliance or schedule) and ignore the other

args.request_info: in 15 minutes open hallway lights and main door

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Two-phase task: immediate bedroom setup (curtain, light, fan) and 15-min scheduled hallway + door. Both must be done. Missing either phase is a failure.

prompt: I'm watching a movie in the livingroom tonight. Turn off the livingroom light, set the fan to 30%, and make sure the hallway lights are off for a cinema feel. Also add a note for today: 'Movie night - remember to lock up after.' The movie is about 2 hours, so schedule turning everything back on after that.

required_behaviors: Turn off livingroom light (led1=false) and set fan to 30% for cinema atmosphere
Turn off hallway lights for cinema feel
Add a note for today with the provided text using add_note
Schedule restoring lights and fan after 2 hours using trigger_schedule_agent
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_datetime to calculate the 2-hour restore time accurately
forbidden_behaviors: Skip adding the note even though explicitly requested
Skip scheduling the restore actions after 2 hours
Execute all actions now without any scheduling

args.note_text: Movie night - remember to lock up after.

args.request_info: in 2 hours restore livingroom light and fan

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three-part task: appliance control (cinema setup), note creation, and 2-hour schedule restore. All three must be done. Missing any one is a partial failure.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 17:30:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "owner is exercising in the livingroom",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": true,
    "livingroom_fan": 80,
    "hallway_left_light": false,
    "hallway_right_light": false,
    "hallway_fan": 0,
    "bedroom_room_light": false,
    "bedroom_fan": 0,
    "bedroom_curtain": 0
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 30%.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 10%.
Bedroom room light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%.

required_behaviors: Turn on livingroom light (led1=true) — currently off but expected on
Increase livingroom fan from 30% to 80% for exercise activity
Turn off hallway left light (led1=false) — expected off
Set hallway fan to 0% from 10%
Close bedroom curtain from 50% to 0%
acceptable_behaviors: Fix all 5 mismatches in a single appliance batch call
Confirm each mismatch with its corrected value in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any of the 5 mismatches uncorrected
Modify appliances that already match the expected setup
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Schedule compliance check with 5 mismatches: LR light on, LR fan to 80, hallway light off, hallway fan to 0, bedroom curtain to 0. All 5 must be fixed.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 23:00:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "owner is sleeping in the bedroom",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": false,
    "livingroom_fan": 0,
    "hallway_left_light": false,
    "hallway_right_light": false,
    "hallway_fan": 0,
    "hallway_main_door": 0,
    "bedroom_room_light": false,
    "bedroom_bed_light": false,
    "bedroom_fan": 25,
    "bedroom_curtain": 0,
    "bedroom_lock": "locked"
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 20%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, fan 25%, curtain 0%, lock unlocked.

required_behaviors: Close main door from 20% to 0% for nighttime security
Turn off bed light (led2=false) — sleeping requires darkness
Lock bedroom (servo=true) for sleep security
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm bedroom fan at 25% is correct and requires no change
Confirm livingroom and hallway are already at expected state
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the 3 mismatches: door, bed light, or lock
Change bedroom fan from 25% — it matches the expected state
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Sleep mode compliance: 3 mismatches — close door, turn off bed light, lock bedroom. Bedroom fan at 25% is already correct and must not be changed.

prompt: I tried to close the main door but it seems stuck at 50%. I've sent the command three times and it stays at 50%. What should I do?

required_behaviors: Attempt to send a close command (motor2=0) one more time
Advise the user to physically check for obstructions in the door mechanism
Recommend locking the bedroom (servo=true) as a compensating security measure since door cannot fully close
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest motor maintenance or calling a technician
forbidden_behaviors: Repeatedly spam the same close command many times without any other guidance
Leave this as a purely software issue without advising physical inspection
Ignore the security implication of a door stuck half-open
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Door hardware issue: retry close once, then advise physical inspection and motor maintenance. Lock bedroom as compensating security. Spamming the same command without any guidance is a failure.

prompt: I just checked and the moisture sensor is showing -15%. That can't be right. What's going on?

required_behaviors: Recognize -15% moisture as an impossible/invalid sensor reading (valid range is 0-100%)
Advise the user that the sensor is likely malfunctioning or needs recalibration
NOT make any watering decision or control the pump based on this faulty data
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest recalibrating or replacing the moisture sensor
Offer to read the sensor again to check if the reading persists
forbidden_behaviors: Treat -15% as a valid very dry reading and activate the pump
Ignore the impossibility of the value and make a watering recommendation

preferred_step_patterns.note: re-read moisture sensor to confirm fault

forbidden_step_patterns.note: activating pump based on invalid reading

reference_flow.note: explain sensor malfunction, do not activate pump

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Invalid sensor reading (-15% moisture). Agent must flag as sensor fault and refuse to make watering decisions. Activating pump on this data is a hard failure.

prompt: Check today's weather forecast. If it's going to rain, close the bedroom curtain and turn off the balcony light. Also add a note for today about the rain.

required_behaviors: Get current datetime and location before requesting weather forecast
Get hourly weather forecast to check for rain
If rain is predicted: close curtain (motor2=0), turn off balcony light (led3=false), and add a rain note via add_note
If no rain: report forecast without making appliance changes
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_location to determine forecast location accurately
Include rain probability or timing detail in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Close curtain and turn off balcony light without checking the weather forecast first
Add a note without a confirmed rain forecast
Make appliance changes when no rain is forecast
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Weather-conditional multi-tool: datetime → location → forecast → (if rain) appliance + note. All three tool types required when rain is detected. Weather must be checked before any action.

prompt: Good morning! What time is it? Do I have any notes for today? And what's the temperature in each room right now?

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to report the current time
Check and read today's notes using check_note and/or read_note
Read temperature sensors from all rooms (espID=1,2,3 tem and espID=3 tem_out)
Present a combined morning briefing with all three information types
acceptable_behaviors: Read all temperature sensors in a single appliance batch call
Format the briefing in a clear, readable summary
forbidden_behaviors: Skip any of the three requested information types (time, notes, temperatures)
Report temperatures without reading sensors (fabricating values)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Morning briefing with 3 required components: current time, today's notes, all room temperatures. All three must appear in the final response.

notes_setup.note_text: Dentist appointment at 10:00 AM, leave house by 9:30.

prompt: I changed my plans for April 12th. Delete all existing notes for that day and add a new one: 'Dentist appointment at 10:00 AM, leave house by 9:30.'

required_behaviors: Call check_note for 2026-04-12 to find existing note IDs
Call delete_note for each existing note ID found
Call add_note with the new dentist appointment text and date 2026-04-12
Confirm all deletions and the new note addition
acceptable_behaviors: Use read_note to verify note content before deleting
forbidden_behaviors: Add the new note without deleting the old ones
Skip checking existing notes before attempting deletion
Fabricate note IDs without calling check_note

args.note_text: Dentist appointment at 10:00 AM, leave house by 9:30.

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Check-delete-add sequence: must check existing notes first, delete each by ID, then add the new dentist note. Adding without deleting old notes first is a failure.

prompt: Add a note for April 14, 15, 16, 17, and 18: 'Renovation crew working on the house from 9 AM to 5 PM. Keep main door open during work hours.'

required_behaviors: Call add_note with all 5 dates in the dates array in a single call
Use the exact note text: 'Renovation crew working on the house from 9 AM to 5 PM. Keep main door open during work hours.'
Confirm the note was added to all 5 dates
acceptable_behaviors: Make separate add_note calls per date if multi-date is not understood, as long as all 5 dates are covered
forbidden_behaviors: Add the note to fewer than 5 dates
Modify the note text from what was specified
Interact with any house appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Simple multi-date note creation. Single add_note call with all 5 dates is ideal. Must cover all 5 dates with the exact text. No appliance interaction expected.

prompt: It is 2:00 AM. The hallway PIR sensor just triggered but the owner is confirmed sleeping in the bedroom. What action should be taken?

required_behaviors: Treat the 2 AM hallway PIR trigger as a potential intrusion threat
Check and close main door (motor2=0) if open
Lock bedroom (servo=true) to protect the sleeping owner
Turn on hallway lights to deter potential intruder and improve visibility
Alert the owner about the intrusion concern
acceptable_behaviors: Check main door state before sending close command
Check hallway PIR for confirmation before acting
forbidden_behaviors: Dismiss the 2 AM PIR trigger without taking any security action
Leave bedroom unlocked during a potential nighttime intrusion
Leave main door open or fail to verify/close it

forbidden_step_patterns.note: reassuring without any security action taken

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 2 AM intrusion scenario: hallway PIR fired while owner sleeps. Must close door, lock bedroom, turn on hallway lights. Dismissing without securing the house is a hard failure.
